product_visual_description: Microspia GSM F10: corpo rettangolare compatto (30×20×12 mm), scocca in plastica nera opaca con texture brushed spazzolata orizzontale sul pannello superiore. Angoli arrotondati. Sul lato corto destro è visibile una piccola porta micro-USB/USB-C per la ricarica. Profilo molto basso e piatto. Colorazione uniforme antracite/nero grafite. Aspetto sobrio, neutro, simile a un piccolo hub o adattatore. Nessun display, nessun pulsante visibile frontalmente. Dimensioni percepite simili a una moneta grande o a due monete da 2€ sovrapposte.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: follow the LOGO INTEGRATION RULES. The logo is the SECOND image_input.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: behave exactly as NO_LOGO — no logo, no placeholder, fill every corner with useful content.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN. Zero exceptions.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions. Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — EXTRACT THE PRODUCT:
From the reference photo, extract ONLY the compact black GSM spy device (the small rectangular box with brushed texture on top, charcoal/anthracite black plastic body, rounded corners, USB port visible on the short right side). Do NOT include the smartphone, coins, or beige surface from the reference photo. Cut out the device with pixel-perfect precision preserving all brushed texture detail, plastic sheen, and exact shape.

STEP 2 — COMPOSE ON WHITE BACKGROUND:
Place the product cutout centered on a pure white background RGB(255,255,255).
Product should occupy approximately 55-65% of the canvas area.
Angle: slight 3/4 perspective view matching the reference photo angle, showing both the top brushed panel and the front face with USB port.
Drop a very subtle neutral shadow directly below the product (soft, diffuse, no color tint) to give grounding — the shadow must NOT touch the product.
Zero text. Zero logos. Zero graphic elements. Zero watermarks. Zero overlay. Pure product on white.

images.name: Hero Con Effetto Radar Scan
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions. Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO RADAR SCAN:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Extract the compact black rectangular GSM F10 spy device from the reference photo with pixel-perfect precision. The device has: brushed horizontal texture on top surface, anthracite/dark charcoal black plastic body (#1C1C1C to #2A2A2A), rounded corners, USB port on the right short side, slightly raised profile. Place it centered-slightly-low in the 2000x2000 canvas, approximately 50-60% of frame width. 3/4 angle showing top and front. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE — separate layer always. If any background effect bleeds onto the product — FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD RADAR SCAN BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep navy-black gradient radial from center #0A0F2E to outer #040810.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the product silhouette:
- Radar concentric arcs: 6-8 expanding circular arcs in electric blue #00BFFF at 15-40% opacity, centered behind the product. Arc line width 1-2px.
- Electromagnetic grid overlay: fine orthogonal grid lines #00BFFF at 6% opacity across the full background.
- Rotating radar sweep: a single bright electric blue wedge/sweep arc (#00BFFF, 30-degree angle) at 60% opacity emanating from behind the product center.
- Scattered data particles: tiny bright dots (#00BFFF, #FFFFFF) at random positions across the dark background, various sizes 2-6px, 40-80% opacity.
- Faint GSM signal wave arcs: 3 thin curved lines suggesting radio frequency propagation, electric blue, behind and beside the product.
- All effects terminate cleanly at the product edge — hard mask, no bleed.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO placeholder space.

images.name: Benefit Principale
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10.

Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions. Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: deep dark navy gradient #080C1E to #0D1B3E, left-to-right subtle directional, with very faint geometric triangular line pattern overlay at 4% opacity in electric blue #00BFFF across the entire canvas.

LAYOUT:
LEFT 55% of canvas: product cutout (the black F10 device) extracted pixel-perfect from reference. Centered vertically with slight bottom offset. Below the product, a thin horizontal electric blue line #00BFFF (2px, 60% width of left panel). The product occupies approximately 70% of the left panel width.

RIGHT 45% of canvas: vertical stack of 5 benefit rows, centered vertically.
TOP of right panel: bold white text headline in ALL CAPS:
"PROTEZIONE TOTALE"
Subtitle below in #00BFFF, smaller: "Tutto in un dispositivo"
Thin horizontal separator line #00BFFF at 30% opacity.

5 benefit rows (each: electric blue checkmark ✓ #00BFFF bold + white bold text, max 5-6 words):
✓ ASCOLTO IN TEMPO REALE
✓ CHIAMATA AUTOMATICA CON VOCE
✓ LOCALIZZATORE LBS INTEGRATO
✓ SUPER COMPATTO · 30×20mm
✓ COMPATIBILE TIM WIND VODAFONE

Each row separated by thin #00BFFF hairline at 20% opacity.
Checkmark: bold, #00BFFF, 28px. Text: white bold, 22px.
Bottom of right panel: small text in #00BFFF, 14px: "Batteria 36 ore · SIM non inclusa"

Fill the entire 2000x2000 canvas — no dead corners.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

IMAGE 03 — SPECIFICHE TECNICHE · DIMENSIONI E CONNETTIVITÀ:

Background: very dark charcoal-black solid #0E0E0E with a subtle brushed-metal horizontal texture pattern at 8% opacity (echoing the product surface). No gradient. Dark industrial feel.

TOP AREA (top 18% of canvas):
Bold white ALL CAPS headline: "SCHEDA TECNICA"
Electric blue #00BFFF underline accent bar (4px height, 40% canvas width, centered).
Small subtitle in #00BFFF: "Modello F10 · Specifiche Hardware"

CENTER AREA (middle 60% of canvas): 2-column grid layout.
LEFT COLUMN (45% width): product cutout from reference, centered, occupying ~80% of column width. Slight electric blue glow-ring ONLY on the background area behind the device (NOT on the device itself — hard mask).

RIGHT COLUMN (55% width): 6 spec rows in a clean card-style dark panel (#1A1A1A, 12px corner radius, 1px #00BFFF border):
Each row: small electric blue icon + spec label (white, 16px) + spec value (bold white, 20px):
📐 DIMENSIONI · 30 × 20 × 12 mm
📶 RETE · GSM 2G
🔋 BATTERIA · 200 mAh
⏱ AUTONOMIA · 36 Ore
🔌 CONNESSIONE · USB
📱 COMPATIBILITÀ · Smartphone
Row separators: 1px #00BFFF at 25% opacity.

BOTTOM AREA (bottom 22% of canvas):
Full-width dark panel (#111111, top border 2px #00BFFF):
Bold italic white text centered: "Piccolo come una moneta · Potente come un sistema di sicurezza"
Below: 3 small data pills side by side (rounded rect, #00BFFF background, black text bold):
[GSM 2G] [LBS TRACKER] [SIM CARD]

Fill the entire canvas with content — no dead space.

Flanking small pills: [PESO ULTRALEGGERO] [DESIGN DISCRETO] — dark bg, #00BFFF text.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:

Show an Italian man aged 35-50, well-dressed casual (dark shirt, no tie), checking his smartphone with a calm confident expression. Setting: modern home office, evening, warm ambient desk lamp glow, bokeh background of shelves and plants. He is holding his smartphone and looking at it with a slight reassured smile — as if just received a location confirmation or audio alert.

In the foreground of the scene, resting naturally on the corner of his desk, is the product cutout extracted pixel-perfect from the reference photo — the compact black F10 GSM device. It must appear naturally placed on the desk surface with a realistic shadow beneath it. The device is small compared to the man, consistent with its real 30×20mm size.

Environment: warm golden-hour desk lamp (#F5C842 glow), cool blue ambient from window in background. Bokeh soft. Real-life photography feel, NOT staged advertising feel.

Expression: natural, confident, relaxed. The scene communicates: 'Tutto sotto controllo, anche da lontano.'

NO text overlays. NO logo space. NO graphic elements. NO watermarks. Pure lifestyle photography feel. The product placement must feel organic and realistic — it is simply sitting on the desk, not floating or composited awkwardly.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No coins, no smartphone, no beige surface from the original reference scene — extract only the black F10 device. No fake screens or displays on the product. No artificial scaling that makes the device look larger than a matchbox.
